title: Desert Dungeon - DungeonZ addon
description: An addon for the Dungeonz mod by Globox_Z adding the Desert Dungeon
body: [![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon/rating.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://moddex.gg/mod/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon) An addon for the Dungeonz mod by Globox_Z adding the Desert Dungeon, a new dungeon which will generate rarely in desert biomes Requires **Dungeonz 1.0.5** or higher to work [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks, however I do not allow the use of my structures in any projects outside of this.
